This concept was deprecated long ago and has no remaining references. It exists to test hard deletion when the TTL (default 50 commits) has been exceeded and zero inbound links remain.

## Details

The concept was originally about a legacy caching strategy that was fully replaced. All references were migrated before deprecation.
